prose.title: afman36-2032
prose.body: AFMAN 36-2032 is a manual titled "Military Leave Program." It provides guidance on military members' entitlements and procedures for taking and accounting for leave. The manual outlines the different types of leave available to military personnel, including regular leave, permissive temporary duty (PTDY), and emergency leave. It also covers procedures for requesting and obtaining leave, as well as the documentation required for leave requests and the responsibilities of supervisors in approving and accounting for leave. This manual is specific to the United States Air Force.
